mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.role, t.description, t.level, t.is_register_default, t.create_time FROM sys_role t, sys_user u WHERE u.id = #{value} AND t.id = u.role_id ORDER BY t.level DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count( * ) FROM sys_role r, sys_user t WHERE r.id = #{value} AND t.role_id = r.id
SELECT t.id, t.role, t.description, t.level, t.is_register_default, t.create_time FROM sys_role t WHERE t.is_register_default = 1 ORDER BY t.level ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT t.id, t.role, t.description, t.level, t.is_register_default, t.create_time FROM sys_role t WHERE t.role = #{role} LIMIT 1
